title: Port in Use
description: The port you are trying to start is being used by another process.

actions.label: Find the process using the port

title: Permission Denied
description: You do not have enough permissions for this action.

title: File Not Found
description: The specified file or directory does not exist.

regex: Cannot find path '([^']+)' because it does not exist
title: Path Not Found
description: The specified path '{PATH}' does not exist.

regex:
([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+):[^
]*'([^']+)' is not a [a-zA-Z0-9_-]+ command[\s\S]*?(?:The most similar command is|Did you mean this\?|similar command is)[\s]*([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)
title: Subcommand Typo
description: The {1} subcommand '{2}' was not found. Did you mean '{3}'?

title: Subcommand Not Found
description: The {1} subcommand '{2}' was not found. See '{1} --help'.
